title: Energy futures volatility increases Midwest electricity costs
summary: Day-ahead power prices projected up 12–18% across several Midwest ISO zones over the next month.
operational_implications: Consider shifting compressor and heavy press schedules toward off-peak hours; budget for higher utility costs; verify emergency generator testing schedule.

title: Stablecoin policy draft tightens KYC for business payments
summary: A U.S. draft stablecoin bill proposes stricter issuer and corporate wallet KYC/recordkeeping requirements.
operational_implications: If finance uses USDC/USDT for vendor payments or reimbursements, prepare to update KYC procedures and recordkeeping; low impact on production operations.

title: Powder coating resin supply disruptions
summary: An outage at a regional supplier could tighten polyester resin availability for 4–6 weeks.
operational_implications: Review alternative resins and safety data sheets; pre-qualify substitutes and update HazCom training if materials change.

title: Bitcoin network fees spike on congestion
summary: On-chain transaction fees increased materially due to network congestion.
operational_implications: Minimal operations impact unless treasury uses BTC for cross-border settlements; monitor if relevant.
